steps.t: Órug, Zhúdo, and Gárjan can be found in the trenches or on the battlefield in the War of Three Peaks. Glóin has sent you on a mission to join the forc…

Ifbar-athrâkh can be found beneath the hillside to the south-east of the forward trenches. You have arrived at the forward trenches and should now see…
Agnar Brokentooth can be found at Ifbar-athrâkh. You have found Agnar Brokentooth in Ifbar-athrâkh. You should deliver Glóin's orders to Agnar Brokent…
